Implement quick sort with last pivot.
Time complexity: O(V+E)
```python
def quick_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr) // 2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    mid = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quick_sort(left) + mid + quick_sort(right)
```

Implement quick sort with middle pivot.
Time complexity: O(log n)
```python
def quick_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr) // 2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    mid = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quick_sort(left) + mid + quick_sort(right)
```

Implement quick sort with middle pivot.
Time complexity: O(n²)
```python
def quick_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr) // 2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    mid = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quick_sort(left) + mid + quick_sort(right)
```

Write a Python function to sort by key.
```python
def gcd(a, b):
    while b:
        a, b = b, a % b
    return a
```
Example: gcd(82, 59) = 1

Write a Python function to count vowels in text.
```python
def fibonacci(n):
    a, b = 0, 1
    for _ in range(n):
        a, b = b, a + b
    return a
```
Example: fibonacci(12) = 144

Implement quick sort with last pivot.
Time complexity: O(log n)
```python
def quick_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr) // 2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    mid = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quick_sort(left) + mid + quick_sort(right)
```

Implement quick sort with first pivot.
Time complexity: O(n)
```python
def quick_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr) // 2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    mid = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quick_sort(left) + mid + quick_sort(right)
```
